events.event_description: First U.S. Minister Resident to Costa Rica presented credentials, establishing the U.S. Legation.

evidence.quote: Mirabeau Buonaparte Lamar, Minister Resident. Appointed: 1858-01-20. Credentials presented: 1858-09-14.

events.event_description: Legation in San Jose formally closed, ending U.S. diplomatic representation in Costa Rica.

evidence.quote: Stewart Johnson, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Legation San Jose closed on 1918-12-05.

events.event_description: U.S. Chargé d'Affaires ad interim presented credentials, reopening the U.S. Legation in Costa Rica after its 1918 closure.

evidence.quote: John Funk Martin, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1920-10-15.

events.event_description: First U.S. Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary to Costa Rica presented credentials, elevating the mission from a Legation to an Embassy.

evidence.quote: Hallett Johnson, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1944-12-16. Credentials presented: 1945-02-14. Left post on 1947-05-16.
